description: One-to-one recreation of the 'sami here' portfolio: a single full-viewport scroll-snap page with four sections (composite hero, bento grid of UI micro-animations, vertical clients ticker, interactive chat) plus a cursor-following chromatic-glitch backdrop shader. The only change from the reference is the hero image: a 3-layer composite — a black-and-white raster sofa, a WebGL 3D CRT computer reading 'Sami here,', and a vector illustration of a reclining person.
genre: Black-and-white indie portfolio; Bricolage Grotesque display + Onest body; snap-scroll storytelling with motion micro-interactions and a chromatic cursor shader

frames.label: Chat · reply thread
frames.setupScript: document.querySelectorAll('#scroller > section')[3].scrollIntoView(); var p=document.getElementById('chat-prompt'); p.click(); var i=document.getElementById('chat-input'); i.value='What can you build for me?'; i.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{key:'Enter'}));
